expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'AL') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'AK') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'AZ') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'AR') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'CA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'CO') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'CP') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'CT') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'DE') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'DC') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'FL') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'GA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'HI') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'ID') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'IL') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'IN') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'IA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'KS') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'KY') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'LA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'ME') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MD') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MI') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MN') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MS') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MO') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MT') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NB') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NV') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NH') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NJ') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NM') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NY') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NC') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'ND') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'OH') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'OK') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'OR') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'PA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'RI') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'SC') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'SD') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'TN') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'TX') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'UT') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'VT') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'VA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'VA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'WA') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'WV') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'WI') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'WY') THEN 'USA' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'BC') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'AB') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'SN') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'ON') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'MB') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NK') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'PQ') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'YT') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NT') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'AT') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NS') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'NF') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'PE') THEN 'CAN' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'PR') THEN 'PRI' WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) = 'VI') THEN 'VIR' ELSE CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(COUNTRY_CODE)))) AS STRING) END)
